creator: rgrimes@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to ruggero.dallaglio from comment #2)
Confirmed, the it translation of this page has broken links.  Not just the ISO links, but all links in the table are broken, and some of the links in the body of the text are broken.

We should look at other languages and see if this is a larger problem, I did check fr and it looks ok
